title: Get Hired in 2026
author: Field notes for Harsh Kasana
description: A working playbook — not theory — for going from 'strong portfolio, unclear path' to an offer: how YC's job board, LinkedIn referrals, and direct company applications actually work in 2026, what's changed in the AI era, and a specific plan for someone with deep Web3/Reactive Network experience and self-taught backend/infra skills but no traditional 'big company' resume line.
